{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Holy Wind
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Holy Wind]] is represented by an old woman in gray.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Holy Wind]] is a school that young geniuses from clans might attend.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
